summary: Comprehensive testing of DVF comparable filtering refactor (iteration 5). All backend APIs (15/15) passed. Frontend fully operational with all new features: relevance scores, excluded comparables with reasons, cross-calibration warning, manual exclusion with recalculate.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns only transactions < 24 months (all dates >= 2024)
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns comparables_period = '24 derniers mois'
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns relevance_score (0-100) for each comparable
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate comparables sorted by relevance_score descending
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns excluded_comparables array
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate excluded_comparables have exclusion_reasons array
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns total_excluded in market_data
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns cross_calibration_warning mentioning SeLoger/LeBonCoin
Backend: POST /api/valuation/recalculate works with empty exclusions
Backend: POST /api/valuation/recalculate with excluded IDs returns different price and excluded_count > 0
Backend: POST /api/valuation/recalculate with nonexistent ID returns 404
Backend: GET /api/report/pdf/{id} returns valid PDF
Backend: GET /api/report/pdf/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: GET /api/listing/report/pdf/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: GET /api/valuation/{id} returns valuation with all new fields
Frontend: Landing page loads with all navigation links (nav-analyze, nav-history, nav-settings)
Frontend: ListingAnalyzer page at /analyze loads with upload zone and analyze button
Frontend: Results page /results/{id} loads with price summary and comparables count
Frontend: Results page Comparables tab shows relevance scores with visual bars (83, 80, 79, etc.)
Frontend: Results page shows cross-calibration warning with SeLoger/LeBonCoin/MeilleursAgents links
Frontend: Results page shows excluded transactions section expandable with exclusion reasons
Frontend: Results page rows are clickable for exclusion (toggle eye icon)
Frontend: Clicking row shows '1 comparable(s) exclu(s) manuellement' with Réinitialiser/Recalculer buttons
Frontend: Recalculate button triggers API call and shows new price result
Frontend: Toast notification 'Recalcul effectué — 19 comparables retenus' appears after recalculate
critical_code_review_comments: Exclusion reasons are well-formatted and transparent: 'Surface trop éloignée', 'Surface trop petite — chambre de service', 'Prix/m² trop bas — probable cave/parking/viager', 'Transaction > 24 mois'
Relevance score calculation combines distance (40%), freshness (35%), and surface similarity (25%) - well documented in code
Progressive radius search (200m → 300m → 500m) ensures minimum 8 comparables before expanding
seed_data_creation: Used valuation ID dc10a2f2-ee48-4f6d-ac3d-ff4e641ec802 created with new algorithm for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: DVF filtering refactor fully tested. Key features: (1) 24-month max freshness (anneemut_min=2024), (2) relevance_score 0-100 for each comparable, (3) excluded_comparables with exclusion_reasons array, (4) cross_calibration_warning with SeLoger/LeBonCoin links, (5) POST /api/valuation/recalculate for manual exclusion with real-time price update. Test valuation ID dc10a2f2-ee48-4f6d-ac3d-ff4e641ec802 has all new fields. Old valuation a4278456-d469-4b25-845b-eccb2d32f8ff may not have all new fields.
